metadata.description: All-in-one workflow plugin for Claude Code. Engineering discipline (TDD, verification, code review), design quality (critique, polish, normalize), and project tracking (phases, milestones, roadmaps) in a single install.

plugins.name: fh
plugins.description: fhhs-skills: Composite workflow skills unifying engineering discipline, design quality, and project tracking. Includes /fh:plan-work, /fh:build, /fh:fix, /fh:review, /fh:ui-critique, /fh:polish, and 30+ more commands.
